## Before Submitting This PR

<!--
Heads up: OpenFlow is a solo project and is NOT actively accepting contributions
right now (see CONTRIBUTING.md). Unsolicited PRs will generally not be merged and
may be closed without a full review. Bug reports via issues are the most useful
way to help. If you're forking to change things for yourself — great, OpenFlow is
MIT-licensed.

`main` is a protected branch: this PR must pass CI (rust-tests + code-quality) and
needs an approving review from a maintainer before it can merge.
-->

**Please confirm you have done the following:**

- [ ] I have searched [existing issues](https://github.com/avijeett007/openflow/issues) and [pull requests](https://github.com/avijeett007/openflow/pulls) (including closed ones) to ensure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/avijeett007/openflow/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

write the code, we want to hear from you directly.
